candidate.completion: send a meme before I start narrating my own life like a BBC wildlife special.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please send a meme before I start narrating my own life like a BBC wildlife special.

evaluation.rationale: The wildlife-documentary image is fresh and specific, and it carries a real truth about lonely self-dramatization. But the turn feels more like comic embellishment than a clean conceptual reversal, and the sentence spends too many words to land with real snap.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
